Class RabbitExchangeQueueProvisioner

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.rabbit.provisioning.RabbitExchangeQueueProvisioner
All Implemented Interfaces:
EventListener, ProvisioningProvider<ExtendedConsumerProperties<RabbitConsumerProperties>, ExtendedProducerProperties<RabbitProducerProperties>>, org.springframework.context.ApplicationListener<org.springframework.amqp.rabbit.core.DeclarationExceptionEvent>
public class RabbitExchangeQueueProvisioner extends Object implements org.springframework.context.ApplicationListener<org.springframework.amqp.rabbit.core.DeclarationExceptionEvent>, ProvisioningProvider<ExtendedConsumerProperties<RabbitConsumerProperties>, ExtendedProducerProperties<RabbitProducerProperties>>
AMQP implementation for ProvisioningProvider.
Author:
Soby Chacko, Gary Russell, Oleg Zhurakousky, Michael Michailidis, Byungjun You, Omer Celik

  • Method Details

    • provisionProducerDestination

      public ProducerDestination provisionProducerDestination(String name, ExtendedProducerProperties<RabbitProducerProperties> producerProperties)
      Description copied from interface: ProvisioningProvider
      Creates middleware destination on the physical broker for the producer to send data. The implementation is middleware-specific.
      Specified by:
      provisionProducerDestination in interface ProvisioningProvider<ExtendedConsumerProperties<RabbitConsumerProperties>, ExtendedProducerProperties<RabbitProducerProperties>>
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the producer destination
      producerProperties - producer properties
      Returns:
      reference to ProducerDestination that represents a producer

    • provisionConsumerDestination

      public ConsumerDestination provisionConsumerDestination(String name, String group, ExtendedConsumerProperties<RabbitConsumerProperties> properties)
      Description copied from interface: ProvisioningProvider
      Creates the middleware destination on the physical broker for the consumer to consume data. The implementation is middleware-specific.
      Specified by:
      provisionConsumerDestination in interface ProvisioningProvider<ExtendedConsumerProperties<RabbitConsumerProperties>, ExtendedProducerProperties<RabbitProducerProperties>>
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the destination
      group - the consumer group
      properties - consumer properties
      Returns:
      reference to ConsumerDestination that represents a consumer

    • groupedName

      protected final String groupedName(String name, String group)
      Construct a name comprised of the name and group.
      Parameters:
      name - the name.
      group - the group.
      Returns:
      the constructed name.

      public static String constructDLQName(String name)
      For binder implementations that support dead lettering, construct the name of the dead letter entity for the underlying pipe name.

      Returns:
